import Changelog from "@site/src/components/Changelog";

# Publik UI: Midnight
If you are looking for starting point imports for your UI use the following import codes. This UI is designed mainly for Shadow Priest, although I also support the following:
- All Priest specs
- All Rogue specs
- Havoc Demon Hunter

In the future I might add support for others.

<Changelog
  docName="ui.md"
  docPath="docs/guides/ui/ui.md"
/>

## Main HUD: Edit Mode

![main_hud](publik_midnight_prepatch.png)

Import the DPS profile into `/editmode` -> `Layout` -> `Import`. This is what I use for all my non-Healing specs that do not use my Healbot config below.

### DPS Profile
```
2 50 0 0 0 7 7 UIParent 0.0 42.0 -1 ##$$%/&('%)#+#,$ 0 1 0 7 7 UIParent 783.7 202.0 -1 ##$$%/&('%(#,$ 0 2 0 0 0 UIParent 785.7 -1064.0 -1 ##$$%/&('%(#,$ 0 3 0 0 0 UIParent 785.7 -1015.0 -1 ##$$%/&('%(#,$ 0 4 0 0 0 UIParent 2086.4 -387.0 -1 #$$$%/&('%(#,$ 0 5 1 1 4 UIParent 0.0 0.0 -1 ##$$%/&('%(#,$ 0 6 1 1 4 UIParent 0.0 -50.0 -1 ##$$%/&('%(#,$ 0 7 1 1 4 UIParent 0.0 -100.0 -1 ##$$%/&('%(#,$ 0 10 0 0 0 UIParent 785.7 -981.0 -1 ##$$&('% 0 11 0 0 0 UIParent 912.7 -981.0 -1 ##$$&('%,# 0 12 0 0 0 UIParent 1285.7 -981.0 -1 ##$$&('% 1 -1 0 7 7 UIParent 2.4 296.8 -1 #$$#%# 2 -1 1 2 2 UIParent 0.0 0.0 -1 ##$#%( 3 0 0 7 7 UIParent -267.6 385.0 -1 $#3# 3 1 0 7 7 UIParent 273.2 384.0 -1 %#3# 3 2 0 7 7 UIParent -290.8 281.1 -1 %#&#3# 3 3 1 0 2 CompactRaidFrameManager 0.0 -7.0 -1 '$(#)#-[.E/#1$3#5$6(7-7$ 3 4 1 0 2 CompactRaidFrameManager 0.0 -5.0 -1 ,#-#.#/#0#1#2(5#6(7-7$ 3 5 1 5 5 UIParent 0.0 0.0 -1 &#*$3# 3 6 1 5 5 UIParent 0.0 0.0 -1 -#.#/#4&5#6(7-7$ 3 7 1 4 4 UIParent 0.0 0.0 -1 3# 4 -1 0 4 4 UIParent 0.0 -393.3 -1 # 5 -1 0 0 0 UIParent 1351.7 -1017.7 -1 # 6 0 1 2 2 UIParent -255.0 -10.0 -1 ##$#%#&.(()( 6 1 1 2 2 UIParent -270.0 -155.0 -1 ##$#%#'+(()(-$ 6 2 1 1 1 UIParent 0.0 -25.0 -1 ##$#%$&.(()(+#,-,$ 7 -1 0 1 1 UIParent 0.0 -2.0 -1 # 8 -1 0 6 6 UIParent 34.0 41.1 -1 #'$@%%&P 9 -1 0 0 0 UIParent 1315.7 -979.0 -1 # 10 -1 1 0 0 UIParent 16.0 -116.0 -1 # 11 -1 0 8 2 BagsBar 0.0 4.0 -1 # 12 -1 0 5 3 MultiBarLeft -4.0 120.0 -1 #+$#%# 13 -1 0 0 0 UIParent 491.4 -1153.4 -1 ##$#%#&- 14 -1 0 0 0 UIParent 1123.3 -992.4 -1 ##$#%( 15 0 1 7 7 StatusTrackingBarManager 0.0 0.0 -1 # 15 1 1 7 7 StatusTrackingBarManager 0.0 17.0 -1 # 16 -1 1 5 5 UIParent 0.0 0.0 -1 #( 17 -1 1 1 1 UIParent 0.0 -100.0 -1 ## ### Healing Profile
```

This profile is imported directly into `/editmode` and moves the central bars around to get more room for my Healbot frames below. If you are not interested in my Healing UI you do not need to import this.

```
2 50 0 0 0 7 7 UIParent 0.0 2.0 -1 ##$$%/&('%)#+#,$ 0 1 0 7 7 UIParent 783.7 202.0 -1 ##$$%/&('%(#,$ 0 2 0 8 2 MainActionBar 0.0 4.0 -1 ##$$%/&('%(#,$ 0 3 0 8 2 MultiBarBottomLeft 0.0 4.0 -1 ##$$%/&('%(#,$ 0 4 0 8 2 MultiBarRight 0.0 4.0 -1 #$$$%/&('%(#,$ 0 5 1 1 4 UIParent 0.0 0.0 -1 ##$$%/&('%(#,$ 0 6 1 1 4 UIParent 0.0 -50.0 -1 ##$$%/&('%(#,$ 0 7 1 1 4 UIParent 0.0 -100.0 -1 ##$$%/&('%(#,$ 0 10 0 6 0 MultiBarBottomRight 0.0 4.0 -1 ##$$&('% 0 11 0 7 7 UIParent -0.0 102.0 -1 ##$$&('%,# 0 12 0 2 0 MainMenuBarVehicleLeaveButton -4.0 0.0 -1 ##$$&('% 1 -1 0 7 7 UIParent 2.4 296.8 -1 #$$#%# 2 -1 1 2 2 UIParent 0.0 0.0 -1 ##$#%( 3 0 0 7 7 UIParent -267.6 385.0 -1 $#3# 3 1 0 7 7 UIParent 273.2 384.0 -1 %#3# 3 2 0 7 7 UIParent -290.8 281.1 -1 %#&#3# 3 3 1 0 2 CompactRaidFrameManager 0.0 -7.0 -1 '#(#)#-#.#/#1$3#5#6(7-7$ 3 4 1 0 2 CompactRaidFrameManager 0.0 -5.0 -1 ,#-#.#/#0#1#2(5#6(7-7$ 3 5 1 5 5 UIParent 0.0 0.0 -1 &#*$3# 3 6 1 5 5 UIParent 0.0 0.0 -1 -#.#/#4&5#6(7-7$ 3 7 1 4 4 UIParent 0.0 0.0 -1 3# 4 -1 0 4 4 UIParent 0.0 -393.3 -1 # 5 -1 0 7 7 UIParent 409.4 2.0 -1 # 6 0 1 2 2 UIParent -255.0 -10.0 -1 ##$#%#&.(()( 6 1 1 2 2 UIParent -270.0 -155.0 -1 ##$#%#'+(()(-$ 6 2 1 1 1 UIParent 0.0 -25.0 -1 ##$#%$&.(()(+#,-,$ 7 -1 0 4 4 UIParent 0.0 350.5 -1 # 8 -1 0 6 6 UIParent 34.0 41.1 -1 #'$@%%&P 9 -1 0 8 2 MultiBarBottomRight 0.0 4.0 -1 # 10 -1 1 0 0 UIParent 16.0 -116.0 -1 # 11 -1 0 8 2 BagsBar 0.0 4.0 -1 # 12 -1 0 8 2 GameTooltipDefaultContainer 0.0 4.0 -1 #'$#%# 13 -1 0 5 3 MainActionBar -4.0 -40.4 -1 ##$#%#&- 14 -1 0 8 6 MultiBarLeft -4.0 0.0 -1 ##$#%( 15 0 0 0 0 UIParent 776.1 -1181.0 -1 # 15 1 0 8 2 MainStatusTrackingBarContainer 0.0 4.0 -1 # 16 -1 1 5 5 UIParent 0.0 0.0 -1 #( 17 -1 1 1 1 UIParent 0.0 -100.0 -1 ## ### Other Addons
```
These addons are smaller parts that make up the total UI that I use.

- [CursorRing](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/cursorring)
- [Astral Keys](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/astral-keys)
- [MPlusTimer](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/mplustimer)
- [Plumber](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/plumber)
- [TargetedSpells](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/targetedspells)
- [Skyriding/Dragonriding Glider](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/glider)
- [BasicMiniMap](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/basic-minimap)
- [Missing Class Buff](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/missing-class-buff) (works for [Power Word: Fortitude](https://www.wowhead.com/spell=21562/power-word-fortitude) and [Shadowform](https://www.wowhead.com/spell=232698/shadowform))

## Cooldown Manager

Make sure you enable the Cooldown Manager itself in `Options` -> `Gameplay Enhancements` -> `Enable Cooldown Manager`. Then you can import my profiles by clicking `Advanced Cooldown Settings` -> `Import`.

I currently only support some specs/classes and I might add configurations for others in the future.

The below settings are just a starting point. I strongly encourage you to open up the Cooldown Manager (`/cdm`) and arrange spells in your desired order/place. The UI should automatically update as you move stuff around so feel free to experiment.

### [Cooldown Manager Centered](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/cooldown-manager-centered)
This addon both center aligns icons in the Cooldown Manager and provides a skin for the icons by default. Import this in `Options` -> `Addons` -> `Cooldown Manager Centered` -> `Profiles` -> `Import`.

This addon also lets you do `/cdm` to open up the Cooldown Manager settings.


## Resource Tracking
For resource tracking I use two addons depending on the class I am playing. Twintop's has a lot of great features I love to have when playing Priest, and will likely add more for other specs in the future. For the time being other classes I just use Sensei.

- Priest: [Twintop's Resource Bar](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/twintops-insanity-bar)
- Others: [SenseiClassResourceBar](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/senseiclassresourcebar)


<details>
<summary>[Twintop's Resource Bar](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/twintops-insanity-bar)</summary>


To import type: `/trb` -> `Import/Export` -> `Import existing settings configuration string`.

```
!TRBv2!
```

To import type: `/trb` -> Make sure `Shadow Priest` section is selected -> `Import`.

```
!TRBv2!
```

To import type: `/trb` -> Make sure `Holy Priest` section is selected -> `Import`.

```
!TRBv2!
```

To import type: `/trb` -> Make sure `Discipline Priest` section is selected -> `Import`.

```
!TRBv2!
```
</details>

<details>
<summary>[SenseiClassResourceBar](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/senseiclassresourcebar)</summary>


## [Platynator](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/platynator)

![platynator screenshot](./platynator.png)

I swapped over to Platynator instead of Plater since it only shows SW:P, VT, and SW:M debuffs on enemy plates.

To import type: `/platynator` -> `General` -> `Import`

In Style Select Tab:
- Friendly: `Name Only (Default)`
- Enemy: `sola`
- Simplified: `Custom`

<!-- 
## [Plater](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/plater-nameplates)

Type in `/plater` -> `Profiles` -> `Import Profile`:

```
!PLATER:2!
``` 
-->

## [Unhalted Unit Frames](https://github.com/DaleHuntGB/UnhaltedUnitFrames)

:::note
I have Unhalted Unit Frames anchored to the Cooldown Manager itself. This means you need to have the Cooldown Manager enabled (`Options` -> `Gameplay Enhancements` -> `Enable Cooldown Manager`) in order for the frames to show up. Enable this before you import the UUF profile. If you only want to see the CDM in combat you might need to un-anchor this to the CDM.
:::

Type in `/uuf` -> `Profiles` -> Paste in below string -> `Import Profile`


## [Details](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/details)

Type `/details options` -> `Profiles` -> `Import Profile`. Afterwards if you want to apply this to all characters be sure that `Use On All Characters` is checked and the `Publik` profile is selected.

## [Healbot](https://www.curseforge.com/wow/addons/heal-bot-continued)
